$comment: App-level settings. Copied to hub.local.json (gitignored) on first build; edit that. familyName fills the greeting; set showGreeting=false to hide it. theme must match a theme name from theme.local.css (e.g. 'hearth' or 'hearth-day'). showAssistant toggles the AI chat orb/bubble — set false to hide it entirely (the dashboard grid reclaims the space).
